i used to do that but now im kinda lazy to do it
basically it's determine what cards your enemy is holding, using the advantage of "holding card" animation and see the card's position
you know the most-right cards will always be posse and wheel. when you do the holding card animation, it will show up as most-left (mirrored) card to your enemy
and then you just have to count them and uhh use maximum brain to know your enemies card
